    [2m   9625ba2..3c44100  HEAD -> release-please--branches--main[0m

• [0mPR #100 is green again.

  I fixed the brittle release-please guardrail in [38;5;6m/Users/matt/.ajax-dev/[39m
  [38;5;6mworktrees/ajax-cli-cbeb640c/release-please-pr100-workspace-versions/crates/[39m
  [38;5;6majax-cli/src/lib/tests.rs[39m. The test no longer hard-codes [38;5;6m0.7.4[39m; it now
  derives the expected linked release line from [38;5;6mcrates/ajax-cli[39m in the
  manifest, and I added a focused regression test to lock that behavior in. I
  pushed commit [38;5;6m3c44100[39m directly to [38;5;6mrelease-please--branches--main[39m, so the fix
  is part of PR [38;5;6m#100[39m and will land on [38;5;6mmain[39m when that release PR merges.

  Tests added or updated:

  - Added
    [38;5;6mrelease_please_workspace_crate_seeds_follow_the_current_cli_release_line[39m
  - Updated [38;5;6mrelease_please_registers_workspace_crates_for_library_only_changes[39m

  Validation I ran:

  - Red phase:
      - [38;5;6mrtk proxy cargo test -p ajax-cli --lib[39m
        [38;5;6mtests::release_please_workspace_crate_seeds_follow_the_current_cli_rele
[39m        [38;5;6mase_line -- --exact --nocapture[39m
  - Green phase:
      - [38;5;6mrtk proxy cargo test -p ajax-cli --lib[39m
        [38;5;6mtests::release_please_workspace_crate_seeds_follow_the_current_cli_rele
[39m        [38;5;6mase_line -- --exact --nocapture[39m
      - [38;5;6mrtk proxy cargo test -p ajax-cli --lib[39m
        [38;5;6mtests::release_please_registers_workspace_crates_for_library_only_chang
[39m        [38;5;6mes -- --exact --nocapture[39m
  - Full local validation:
      - [38;5;6mrtk cargo fmt --check[39m
      - [38;5;6mrtk cargo check --all-targets --all-features[39m
      - [38;5;6mrtk cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings[39m
      - [38;5;6mrtk cargo nextest run --all-features[39m
      - [38;5;6mrtk cargo doc --no-deps --all-features[39m
      - [38;5;6mRUSTDOCFLAGS='-D warnings' rtk cargo doc --no-deps --all-features[39m
      - [38;5;6mrtk cargo audit[39m
  - Repo hook during commit also passed its full verification set.

  Commands that failed:

  - [38;5;6mrtk proxy cargo test -p ajax-cli --lib[39m
    [38;5;6mtests::release_please_workspace_crate_seeds_follow_the_current_cli_release_
[39m    [38;5;6mline -- --exact --nocapture[39m
      - Failed as expected in the red phase because the temporary brittle
        expectation returned [38;5;6m0.7.4[39m while the regenerated release manifest was
        [38;5;6m0.8.0[39m.
      - Fixed by deriving the seed line from [38;5;6mmanifest["crates/ajax-cli"][39m.

  Remote result for https://github.com/mossipcams/ajax-cli/pull/100:

  - [38;5;6mFormat and Duplication[39m: success
  - [38;5;6mCargo Check[39m: success
  - [38;5;6mClippy[39m: success
  - [38;5;6mNextest and Doc Tests[39m: success

  - [38;5;6mCargo Audit[39m: success
  - [38;5;6mSmoke[39m: success
  - aggregate [38;5;6mCI[39m: success

  Limitation:

  - [38;5;6mcargo audit[39m still reports the same 2 allowed warnings already present in
    the repo ([38;5;6mansi_term[39m unmaintained and yanked [38;5;6maes 0.9.0[39m), but the command
    completed successfully and this fix did not change that baseline.
